data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 44f834568138 is on main, containing implementation commit 1624a772c1a8; (2) CI run 23431586421 passed green; (3) compareBeatsByMostRecentlyUpdated correctly sorts by descending updated timestamp with deterministic tiebreakers (natural ID compare, then repo scope); (4) retakes-view.tsx uses the extracted comparator at line 292; (5) regression tests added in beat-sort.test.ts. No invariants to check. No regressions detected.
